id: get-multi-precheck-result

hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Multi precheck result"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/financing/v1/scorings/precheck/extended/batches/{batchId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Getting result of finished multi precheck.

In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 404         | APPLICATION_NOT_FOUND  | The requested resource could not be found |
| 422         | NOT_SUPPORTED | Resource is not supported for given financing type |
| 422         | UNPROCESSABLE | The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors |
| 500         | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"batchId","in":"path","description":"","required":true,"example":"11200a0ee1","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Actual application data","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","status"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of multi precheck's batch."},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["SUCCESS","PARTIAL_SUCCESS","FAILURE","PROCESSING"],"description":"Result of the precheck's batch."},"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id","recommendation","customer","potentialCreditAmount"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"1234","description":"Unique identificator of Precheck. Send this identificator in ApplicationRequest to improve approval rate."},"recommendation":{"type":"boolean","description":"A recommendation of whether the order should be passed to the HCO.\n\n    true = Application is likely going to be approved.\nfalse = Application is likely going to be rejected."},"message":{"type":"string","example":"V HCO peněžence nemáte dostatečný limit.","description":"Custom message for customer."},"customer":{"type":"object","required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","example":"John","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","example":"Newborn","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","example":"john.newborn@country.com","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","example":"+420777123456","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","example":"1576849","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"title":"PrecheckCustomer"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","example":133000,"description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","example":"CZK","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"title":"AmountOld"}},"title":"PrecheckResult"},"description":"REQUIRED if precheck ended with `SUCCESS` or `PARTIAL_SUCCESS`"}},"title":"MultiPrecheckResult"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"id":"","status":"SUCCESS","data":[{"recommendation":false,"message":"V HCO peněžence nemáte dostatečný limit.","id":"1234","customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"}}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
